Brand Guidelines

The Ironwood Superyachts

Contents

A comprehensive guide to the Indo Yachts brand identity. Indonesia's premier luxury expedition charter company for diving, family adventures, and extraordinary marine encounters.

1
Brand Essence
Heritage, philosophy, and the pillars that define Indo Yachts
2
Logo System
Wordmark, sails mark, and usage guidelines
3
Color Architecture
Primary palette, neutrals, and expedition colors
4
Typography
Typefaces, hierarchy, and text styling
5
Layout Patterns
Page structures and design principles
6
Expedition Palette
Deep Sea, Lagoon, and underwater world applications
7
Applications
Heroes, cards, buttons, and component examples
8
Implementation
CSS variables and code reference
01

Brand Essence

Heritage

Since 2012, Indo Yachts has been crafting extraordinary voyages through Indonesia's most pristine waters. Our hand-built ironwood vessels—phinisi schooners born from centuries of maritime tradition—carry guests to the world's most biodiverse marine destinations.

With over 500 charters completed and 25+ expeditions to Raja Ampat alone, we've established ourselves as the definitive authority on Indonesian luxury charter.

Promise

We deliver extraordinary underwater encounters and family adventures aboard the finest expedition yachts in Indonesian waters. Our expertise runs deep—from the coral gardens of Misool to the volcanic shores of Komodo.

Indo Yachts exists for those who seek destinations beyond the ordinary, delivered with expertise that only comes from over a decade of dedicated service in these extraordinary waters.

Brand Pillars

Heritage Craft

Hand-built ironwood vessels. Centuries of Indonesian maritime tradition.

Expedition Excellence

Raja Ampat. Banda Sea. Komodo. Waters few will ever experience.

Marine Discovery

World-class diving. Pristine reefs. Extraordinary marine encounters.

Family Legacy

Multi-generational voyages. Memories that last a lifetime.

02

Logo System

The Indo Yachts wordmark is a bespoke logo—not a standard typeface. It embodies the refined elegance of our brand and must never be recreated, substituted, or diminished. Always bold. Never shy.

Primary — Oxblood on White

The definitive presentation. Bold, confident, unmistakable.

Primary — White on Deep Sea

Expedition contexts. Always clearly visible, never faded.

Deep Sea

Sails Mark — Oxblood

Sails Mark — White

The sails mark is used independently as a favicon, page marker, or subtle brand element. Never combine with the wordmark.

02

Logo Usage

Do

Use generous clear space—minimum equal to the height of the "I" in Indo

Don't

Combine sails mark with wordmark—they must never appear together

Do

Display the logo boldly and prominently—never diminished or shy

Don't

Use the logo at low opacity or as a background watermark

Do

Use white logo on Deep Sea for expedition/diving contexts

Don't

Attempt to recreate the wordmark with any typeface

Do

Use the sails mark at subtle opacity for page markers only

Don't

Rotate, skew, add effects, or alter proportions

03

Color Architecture

Primary Brand — Oxblood Family

Oxblood#953334
Oxblood Deep#722728
Oxblood Dark#5C1F20

Neutral Palette

White#FFFFFF
Snow#FAFAFA
Mist#E8E8E8
Silver#9A9A9A
Pewter#6B6B6B
Slate#4A4A4A
Charcoal#1A1A1A

Expedition Palette — Shared with Explorers

Deep Sea#0A1628
Abyss#061018
Lagoon#2B9E8F
Reef#1E7A6D

The Expedition Palette is shared with Explorers, creating brand cohesion across the family. These colors represent our diving heritage and Indonesia's extraordinary underwater world.

04

Typography

Wordmark
Bespoke logo. Never substitute with any typeface.
Headlines
Sorong to Ambon
Cormorant Garamond Light 300 · Oxblood Deep #722728 · Line Height 1.1
Subheadlines
The Ironwood Superyacht
Cormorant Garamond Light 300 Italic · Oxblood #953334
Eyebrow / Labels
YOUR ITINERARY
Manrope Semi-Bold 600 · Slate #4A4A4A · 0.2em tracking · Uppercase
Body Copy
Covering 600 nautical miles of astonishing Indonesian seascape, this exciting itinerary of exploration and adventure takes in some of Indonesia's most significant cruising destinations. Dazzling coral reefs combine with jaw-dropping topside scenery. Remote sandy islands offer seclusion and solitude.
Manrope Regular 400 · Slate #4A4A4A · Line Height 1.85
Specifications
Length
50.0m (164.0')
Beam
9.8m (32.0')
Guests
14
Crew
18
Labels: Manrope Semi-Bold 600, Silver #9A9A9A · Values: Manrope Medium 500, Oxblood #953334
05

Layout Patterns

Critical Design Rules

Do

Use sharp, 90° corners on all UI elements—no exceptions

Don't

Apply border-radius or rounded corners anywhere

Do

Use pure white (#FFFFFF) as the primary background

Don't

Use cream, ivory, or warm off-whites

Do

Maintain generous white space throughout

Don't

Crowd elements or compress spacing

Signature Layouts

Split Layout: Content on left with batik watermark (96% white overlay), full-bleed photography on right. Used for contents, itineraries, and hero sections.

YOUR ITINERARY
Sorong to Ambon

Specs Grid: Labels in silver uppercase, values in oxblood. Subtle mist dividers. Clean, informative, luxurious.

Vela
Length
50.0m
Beam
9.8m
Guests
14
06

Expedition Palette

The Expedition Palette—shared with Explorers—represents our diving heritage and Indonesia's extraordinary marine world. Deep Sea provides sophisticated dark contexts. Lagoon evokes crystal tropical waters.

White Logo on Deep Sea

Bold and unmistakable. For diving sections, footers, dark heroes.

Lagoon Applications

Evokes crystal waters. CTAs, diving highlights, accent elements.

Expedition Typography

Raja Ampat
The Last Paradise

Home to 75% of all known coral species. The most biodiverse marine ecosystem on Earth. Extraordinary encounters with manta rays, whale sharks, and pristine reef systems.

Dive Sites
50+
Coral Species
600+
Fish Species
1,700+
Visibility
30m+

08

Implementation

CSS variables for implementing the Indo Yachts brand in web projects. Copy these values directly into your stylesheets to ensure brand consistency across all digital touchpoints.

Complete Color System

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ INDO YACHTS BRAND COLORS Version 1.0 · December 2024 ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ :root { /* Primary — Oxblood Family */ --oxblood: #953334; --oxblood-deep: #722728; --oxblood-dark: #5C1F20; /* Neutrals */ --white: #FFFFFF; --snow: #FAFAFA; --mist: #E8E8E8; --silver: #9A9A9A; --pewter: #6B6B6B; --slate: #4A4A4A; --charcoal: #1A1A1A; /* Expedition — Shared with Explorers */ --deep-sea: #0A1628; --abyss: #061018; --lagoon: #2B9E8F; --reef: #1E7A6D; }

Typography

/* Headlines — Cormorant Garamond */ font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300; color: var(--oxblood-deep); /* Body & UI — Manrope */ font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; color: var(--slate); /* Eyebrows — Manrope Semi-Bold */ font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.6875rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;

Critical Rules

/* NO rounded corners — ever */ border-radius: 0; /* Primary background */ background: var(--white); /* Expedition sections */ background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--deep-sea), var(--abyss)); /* Batik watermark: 96% white overlay */ background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96); /* Logo: Always bold, never faded or shy */

Adventures start here.

This document is not contractual. All information and images provided by the company are offered in good faith for informational purposes only. The company makes no representations, warranties, or legal liability for the accuracy, reliability, completeness, or usefulness of the information or images displayed. Yacht inventory, charter prices, and other specifications are subject to change without notice. No information or images may be reproduced without the company's written consent.
